title: phemeranthus greenmanii
intro: Phemeranthus greenmanii, also known as Green's sandmat or Green's pusley, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Phemeranthus greenmanii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
